creator: conall@conall.net
text:
Further data for debugging:


When running the problematic kernel:

FreeBSD galvatron.taku.ie 8.2-STABLE FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE #1: Sat Mar 19
13:18:46 UTC 2011
root@galvatron.taku.ie:/usr/src/obj/usr/src/sys/GALVATRON  amd64
